resume.intro: Full-stack developer with experience in web application development using frameworks such as Laravel, Next.js, and Vue 3. Capable of building interactive, responsive web applications while maximizing the user experience by ensuring optimal application performance.

details: Build the frontend interface according to the structure and format provided by the UI/UX team.
Adapting to the development process, for example: using various tools and utilities as needed for the project, and adhering to the team’s coding standards.
Use Git as a version control system (VCS) and actively contribute by following best practices for using Git.
Creating a code structure that is consistent, sustainable, and effective without limiting flexibility for other development teams.
Conduct testing to ensure that user requests and server responses align with the application workflow.

sectionEducation.institutionName: SMK Negeri 2 Depok Sleman (Vocational High School)
details: Represented at the 2024 provincial-level Student Skills Competition (LKS) in the Web Technology category and placed 5th.
Assisting in the development and improvement of school infrastructure in the area of web development.

sectionSkill.title: Soft Skill
details: Easily adapts to new environments and technologies.
Able to identify the root cause of a problem and find effective solutions.
Attention to detail to ensure perfect, high-quality results.

personal-website.title: Personal Website
personal-website.description: A personal website created to express ideas and showcase past projects through an interactive web experience. Developed as a platform with a focus on thoughtful design, a seamless user experience, and a polished presentation of creative and technical work.

stage-two.title: Stage Two (interactive web designer for GRUB boot loader)
stage-two.description: Stage Two is a modern, browser-based GRUB theme builder for designing, and visualizing GRUB bootloader's look all inside browser. This runs entirely on the client side, which assets such as images, fonts, and configuration files stored locally on the machine (using IndexedDB API). This ensures all of the changes are remain persistent and is fully offline-capable.

sim-web.title: SIM Web (school management system)
sim-web.description: A management application designed to assist students, teachers, and staff in implementing the teaching and learning activities at school. It provides easy access to attendance data, leave requests, fieldwork programs, and more. Integrating actions into a single system to ensure flexibility in data access and management over the long term.

about.title: A full stack developer with experience in website development using various framework and libraries
about.subtitle: Able to build interactive, responsive web applications, and providing optimal performance to maximize users experience
